name: Lithium One Inc.
description: Lithium One Inc. was a Canada-based resource exploration and development company focused on lithium and lithium-potash deposits in North and South America. The company was publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol LI. Its primary assets included the Sal de Vida lithium and potash brine project in Argentina and the James Bay project in Canada. In 2012, Lithium One Inc. was acquired by Galaxy Resources Ltd. in a friendly transaction, leading to its subsequent delisting from the stock exchange.
